en.extract:
The Arabian sunbird (Cinnyris hellmayri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.


Subspecies
Cinnyris hellmayri hellmayri Neumann
Cinnyris hellmayri kinneari Bates


Distribution
It is native to the Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna.


Habitat
This species prefers rocky or sandy areas and dry river beds with Acacia and Ziziphus trees.


References

The '''Arabian sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris hellmayri''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].

==Subspecies==
* ''Cinnyris hellmayri hellmayri'' <small>Neumann</small>
* ''Cinnyris hellmayri kinneari'' <small>Bates</small><ref name="will">{{cite journal|author=Williams, J. G. |journal=Condor|volume=57|issue=5|pages=249–262 |title=A systematic revision and natural history of the shining sunbird of Africa|year=1955|url=http://sora.unm.edu/node/100736|doi=10.2307/1364731|jstor=1364731|doi-access=free}}</ref>

==Distribution==
It is native to the [[Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna]].<ref name="will" />

==Habitat==
This species prefers rocky or sandy areas and dry river beds with [[Acacia]] and [[Ziziphus]] trees.<ref name="will" />

==References==
